title: coelopleurum rupestre
intro: Coelopleurum rupestre, also known as the Himalayan rush, is a plant species that belongs to the family Apiaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant effects. The plant is said to provide health benefits such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and soothing digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Coelopleurum rupestre include decoctions and infusions, which can be used to make teas or taken as a supplement to support overall well-being.
